chosen_action.title: Repair empty-board hold-window truth so the selector stops collapsing back to fake measurement holds

why_this_action.summary: The live marketing loop was still collapsing into measurement_hold even though the execution board explicitly said there was no truthful do-now packet, historical re-entry repairs were already in force, and the remaining manual publisher asset was suppressed by the same-family repair window. The highest-leverage executable move was to patch selector truth handling so historical hold repairs carry forward correctly, suppressed manual-only assets no longer masquerade as live do-now lanes, and the active selector resolves to the guarded architecture state instead of another fake hold.
shared_findings_used: drafts/marketing_execution_board_latest.md: no truthful do-now packet exists in the current review window
drafts/post_hold_distribution_reentry_latest.md: if the board is still empty after blockers clear, choose distribution_architecture_repair instead of another hold
agents/marketing/logs/marketing_workflow_audit_latest.md: primary-repo-flat packet churn is low-signal and should not be rewarded with another follow-through hold
agents/marketing/logs/distribution_lane_latest.md: the selector was still pointing at measurement_hold before this repair

result.summary: Patched distribution lane truth handling, added regression coverage, ran the focused selector suite, and verified that the live selector now resolves to distribution_architecture_guard_pause instead of measurement_hold for the current empty-board fingerprint.
